==History== * Late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to around the [[:en:4th century|4th century]] – Kofun were constructed. * [[:en:1987|1987]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 62) [[:en:September 9|September 9]] – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} of [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. * [[:en:1992|1992]] ([[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]] 4) [[:en:August 15|August 15]] – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by [[:en:Komaki|Komaki City]].
==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * [[:en:Higashinomiya Kofun|Higashi-no-miya Kofun]]
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, [[:en:Komaki|Komaki City]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]].
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki [[:en:Bus stop|Stop]] of [[:en:Meitetsu Bus|Meitetsu Bus]].
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the [[:en:Jōmon period|Jomon Period]] to the [[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi Period]], located near the kofun group.
==External Links== * [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofun Group] (Komaki City Homepage)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of [[:en:Komaki|Komaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to the [[:en:4th century|4th century]].
==History==
* Late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to [[:en:4th century|4th century]]: Construction of the Kofuns. * [[:en:September 9|September 9]], [[:en:1987|1987]] ([[:en:Shōwa|Shōwa]] 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible [[:en:Cultural property|Cultural property]] by [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. * [[:en:August 15|August 15]], [[:en:1992|1992]] ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, [[:en:Komaki|Komaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]].
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki [[:en:Bus stop|Bus stop]] via [[:en:Meitetsu Bus|Meitetsu Bus]].
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the [[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi period]].
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

==History== * Late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to around the [[:en:4th century|4th century]] – Kofun were constructed. * [[:en:1987|1987]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 62) [[:en:September 9|September 9]] – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} of [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. * [[:en:1992|1992]] ([[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]] 4) [[:en:August 15|August 15]] – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by [[:en:Komaki|Komaki City]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of [[:en:Komaki|Komaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to the [[:en:4th century|4th century]].
==History==
* Late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to [[:en:4th century|4th century]]: Construction of the Kofuns. * [[:en:September 9|September 9]], [[:en:1987|1987]] ([[:en:Shōwa|Shōwa]] 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible [[:en:Cultural property|Cultural property]] by [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. * [[:en:August 15|August 15]], [[:en:1992|1992]] ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, [[:en:Komaki|Komaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]].
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki [[:en:Bus stop|Bus stop]] via [[:en:Meitetsu Bus|Meitetsu Bus]].
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the [[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi period]].
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

==History== * Late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to around the [[:en:4th century|4th century]] – Kofun were constructed. * [[:en:1987|1987]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] 62) [[:en:September 9|September 9]] – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} of [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. * [[:en:1992|1992]] ([[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]] 4) [[:en:August 15|August 15]] – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by [[:en:Komaki|Komaki City]].
==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * [[:en:Higashinomiya Kofun|Higashi-no-miya Kofun]]
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, [[:en:Komaki|Komaki City]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]].
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki [[:en:Bus stop|Stop]] of [[:en:Meitetsu Bus|Meitetsu Bus]].
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the [[:en:Jōmon period|Jomon Period]] to the [[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi Period]], located near the kofun group.
==External Links== * [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofun Group] (Komaki City Homepage)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of [[:en:Komaki|Komaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to the [[:en:4th century|4th century]].
==History==
* Late [[:en:3rd century|3rd century]] to [[:en:4th century|4th century]]: Construction of the Kofuns. * [[:en:September 9|September 9]], [[:en:1987|1987]] ([[:en:Shōwa|Shōwa]] 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible [[:en:Cultural property|Cultural property]] by [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. * [[:en:August 15|August 15]], [[:en:1992|1992]] ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, [[:en:Komaki|Komaki]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]].
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki [[:en:Bus stop|Bus stop]] via [[:en:Meitetsu Bus|Meitetsu Bus]].
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the [[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi period]].
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. * Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|WD=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].

==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==

[[ja:小木古墳群]] ==Merged second translation== {{Unreferenced|date=2023-09-10 (Sun) 01:56 (UTC)}} '''Koki Kofun Group''' (小木古墳群) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun Period}} located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no comprehensive investigation has been conducted, the excavated artifacts are believed to date from the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}.
==History== * Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}} – Kofun were constructed. * {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} 62) {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9}} – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan}}} of {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|WD=Q234510|lt=Heisei}} 4) {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15}} – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan}}} by {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}.
==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|WD=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the {{ill|Jōmon period|en|Jōmon period|WD=Q52824|lt=Jomon Period}} to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi Period}}, located near the kofun group.
==External Links== * [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofun Group] (Komaki City Homepage)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11460936]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}.
==History==
* Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|WD=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period}}.
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}.
==History==
* Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|WD=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period}}.
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:小木古墳群]] ==Merged second translation== {{Unreferenced|date=2023-09-10 (Sun) 01:56 (UTC)}} '''Koki Kofun Group''' (小木古墳群) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun Period}} located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no comprehensive investigation has been conducted, the excavated artifacts are believed to date from the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}}.
==History== * Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century}} – Kofun were constructed. * {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} 62) {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9}} – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan}}} of {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|WD=Q234510|lt=Heisei}} 4) {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15}} – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan}}} by {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}.
==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|WD=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the {{ill|Jōmon period|en|Jōmon period|WD=Q52824|lt=Jomon Period}} to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi Period}}, located near the kofun group.
==External Links== * [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofun Group] (Komaki City Homepage)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|WD=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the {{ill|Jōmon period|en|Jōmon period|WD=Q52824|lt=Jomon Period}} to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi Period}}, located near the kofun group.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}
{{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.
==History==
* Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|WD=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property|1=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Bus stop|1=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period|1=Yayoi period}}.
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724|1=Koyashiki Kofun No. 2}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}
{{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.
==History==
* Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|WD=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property|1=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Bus stop|1=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period|1=Yayoi period}}.
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:小木古墳群]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] ==Merged second translation== {{Unreferenced|date=2023-09-10 (Sun) 01:56 (UTC)}} '''Koki Kofun Group''' (小木古墳群) is a group of {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} from the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun Period|1=Kofun period}} located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no comprehensive investigation has been conducted, the excavated artifacts are believed to date from the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.
==History== * Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}} – Kofun were constructed. * {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa era}} 62) {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} of {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|WD=Q234510|lt=Heisei|1=Heisei era}} 4) {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} by {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City|1=Komaki}}.
==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|WD=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun|1=Higashinomiya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724|1=Koyashiki Kofun No. 2}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Stop|1=Bus stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the {{ill|Jōmon period|en|Jōmon period|WD=Q52824|lt=Jomon Period|1=Jōmon period}} to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi Period|1=Yayoi period}}, located near the kofun group.
==External Links== * [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofun Group] (Komaki City Homepage)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Although no comprehensive investigation has been conducted, the excavated artifacts are believed to date from the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.
==History== * Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}} – Kofun were constructed. * {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa era}} 62) {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} – The {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} was designated as a tangible {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} of {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|WD=Q234510|lt=Heisei|1=Heisei era}} 4) {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} – The {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} was designated as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|WD=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} by {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City|1=Komaki}}.
==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|WD=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun|1=Higashinomiya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724|1=Koyashiki Kofun No. 2}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Stop|1=Bus stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the {{ill|Jōmon period|en|Jōmon period|WD=Q52824|lt=Jomon Period|1=Jōmon period}} to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi Period|1=Yayoi period}}, located near the kofun group.
==External Links== * [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofun Group] (Komaki City Homepage)

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}
{{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.
==History==
* Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|WD=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|WD=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|WD=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|WD=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|WD=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property|1=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|WD=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Bus stop|1=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period|1=Yayoi period}}.
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|WD=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun|1=Higashinomiya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579724|1=Koyashiki Kofun No. 2}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442999}}
==Location== * Within the area of 2nd and 3rd chōme in Koki, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|WD=Q389537|lt=Komaki City|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|WD=Q953806|lt=Stop|1=Bus stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==Related Articles== * {{ill|Odaido Ruins|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaido Ruins|1=Oda Ido Site|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608252}} – Ruins dating from the period spanning the {{ill|Jōmon period|en|Jōmon period|WD=Q52824|lt=Jomon Period|1=Jōmon period}} to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi Period|1=Yayoi period}}, located near the kofun group.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小木古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site}}
{{Sources needed|date=September 10, 2023}} '''Koki Kofuns''' (小木古墳群, ''Koki Kofungun'') are a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) from the [[Kofun period]] located in the Koki district in the western part of {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|qid=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Although no formal archaeological survey has been conducted, the artifacts unearthed suggest they date to the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|qid=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|qid=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.
==History==
* Late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|qid=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|qid=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}: Construction of the Kofuns. * {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}, {{ill|1987|en|1987|qid=Q2429|lt=1987|1=1987}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|qid=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 62): The [[Utsunomiya Shrine|Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun]] ({{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}}) was designated as a tangible {{ill|Cultural property|en|Cultural property|qid=Q2065736|lt=Cultural property|1=Cultural property}} by {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}, {{ill|1992|en|1992|qid=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} ([[:en:Heisei|Heisei]] 4): The Kōyashiki Kofun was designated as a cultural property by [[Komaki City]].
==Notable Kofuns==
* {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja|宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宇都宮神社 (小牧市)}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Kōyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyashiki Kofun|qq=}} * Higashi-no-Miya Kofun
===Destroyed Kofuns===
* Kōyashiki No. 2 Kofun * Tennozan Kofun
==Location==
* Koki 2-chome and 3-chome, {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|qid=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
==Access==
* Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|qid=Q953806|lt=Bus stop|1=Bus stop}} via {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|qid=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
==See Also==
* {{ill|Oda Ido Site|ja|織田井戸遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Ido Site|qq=}} – An archaeological site near the Kofuns, spanning from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|qid=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period|1=Yayoi period}}.
==External Links==
* [http://www.city.komaki.aichi.jp/admin/event_1/events/bunkazai/2/1/13694.html Koki Kofuns] (Komaki City website)
{{translated page|ja|小木古墳群|version=96886308|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Although no comprehensive investigation has been conducted, the excavated artifacts are believed to date from the late {{ill|3rd century|en|3rd century|qid=Q8101|lt=3rd century|1=3rd century}} to around the {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|qid=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}}.

==Main Kofun== * {{ill|Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|ja|宇都宮神社 (小牧市)|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine|lt=Utsunomiya Shrine Kofun|lt_ja=宇都宮神社古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Shrine (Komaki City)|1=Utsunomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449800}} * Jōonji Kofun * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun|ja|甲屋敷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun|1=Kōyashiki Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11577730}} * {{ill|Higashinomiya Kofun|en|Higashinomiya Kofun|qid=Q11523913|lt=Higashi-no-miya Kofun|1=Higashinomiya Kofun}}
===Lost Kofun=== * {{ill|Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja|甲屋敷第2号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyashiki Kofun No. 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579724|1=Koyashiki Kofun No. 2}} * {{ill|Tennōzan Kofun|ja|天王山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōzan Kofun|1=Tennōzan Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442999}}

==Transportation== * Alight at the Koki {{ill|Bus stop|en|Bus stop|qid=Q953806|lt=Stop|1=Bus stop}} of {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|qid=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}}.
